findings.evidence: New lemma at line 43 states `(q : ℤ) ∣ D ↔ (q : ℤ) ∣ primeDiscriminantRadicand D`; the existing parallel odd-prime API marks pointwise divisibility forms as simp: `PrimeDiscriminant.lean:95 @[simp] theorem oddPrimeDiscriminant_dvd_iff`, `:104 @[simp] theorem dvd_oddPrimeDiscriminant_iff`, `:113 @[simp] theorem not_dvd_oddPrimeDiscriminant_iff`.
findings.fix: Add `@[simp]` to `dvd_primeDiscriminant_iff_dvd_radicand`; the family lemma can then be proved/used via `simp_rw` rather than requiring manual `.mp` conversions.
findings.issue: `dvd_primeDiscriminant_iff_dvd_radicand` is the characteristic divisibility normal form for the new radicand bridge but is not marked `@[simp]`, so downstream unramifiedness goals do not simplify through the public API.

summary: The public surface is otherwise scoped to the prime-discriminant splitting bridge, but the new pointwise divisibility characteristic lemma is missing the automation annotation used by the parallel API.
